title: tectaria decurrens var. pteropus-minor
intro: Tectaria decurrens var. pteropus-minor is a species of fern commonly found in tropical forests, particularly in Southeast Asia, and is also known as the lesser flying fern. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tectaria decurrens var. pteropus-minor are numerous, including its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, reduce fever, and treat wounds. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are made by drying the leaves and roots and then boiling them in water or applying them topically to the affected area.
